# programs.joshuto

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.joshuto`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --------------------------- | ------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `programs.joshuto.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable joshuto file manager. |
| `programs.joshuto.keymap` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/joshuto/keymap.toml . |
| `programs.joshuto.mimetype` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/joshuto/mimetype.toml . |
| `programs.joshuto.package` | `package` | The joshuto package to use. |
| `programs.joshuto.settings` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/joshuto/joshuto.toml . |
| `programs.joshuto.theme` | `TOML value` | Configuration written to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/joshuto/theme.toml . |
